body: Implemented ai_chi/core/ledger/autopoiesis_ledger.py with mock local SigmaCredit cost calculation, schema-shaped ComputeReceipt payloads, MEBUS envelope writes, and FileBackedSigmaTransport persistence. Wired ai_chi/orbi/policy_gate.py through an optional passive autopoiesis_ledger hook plus with_local_autopoiesis_ledger(storage_dir). Added tests for denied zero-cost receipts, allowed positive-cost receipts, PolicyGate integration, and passive failure behavior. Verification: py_compile OK; Autopoiesis tests 4 OK; Orbi/PolicyGate focused tests 27 OK; transport/economics tests 13 OK; verify_floor True; full ai_chi suite 335 OK. Boundary preserved: local simulation only, no installs, no app config changes, no credentials, no services, no provider calls, no spending, no ICP/on-chain writes, no deployment.
constraints: AutopoiesisLedger is passive and local-only; it must not be used as settlement, real payment, provider execution, or ICP approval.
forbidden_actions: No installs, credentials, app config mutation, MCP installs, service writes, provider calls, real spending, ICP/on-chain writes, deployment, or hidden listeners.
requested_output: Builder-Scout ack, optional next scout proposal, or Claude audit handoff; provider/spending/ICP promotion remains stop-gated.
summary: Codex implemented Antigravity's AutopoiesisLedger scaffold, wired passive PolicyGate metering, and verified the repo at 335 tests OK.
